free_text: Alpha particle bombardments of natural nickel target
Self-supporting natural Ni foils (13-25 mg/cm2 thick,
uniformity better than 3%) electroplated on Cu foils.
10 to 13 foils were stacked together without any other
or 60 min (for long-lived products) by 40 MeV alphas
Energy degradation was calculated according to
Williamson (1966). Accuracy of the energy may be not
better than +/-0.5% for energies below 15 MeV.
Total beam current measured by Faraday cup
No information on the uncertainty in cross section.
Obtained by summing the observed activities in each
The same group define their thick target yield by
"activities produced by a 1-h irradiation with the
beam current of 1 uA" in the same year (Nagame, 1978),
and the definition is adopted in this subentry.
Definition of the thick target yield by the same group
